title: aeluropus laevis
intro: Aeluropus laevis, also known as smooth couch grass, is a type of grass native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Aeluropus laevis include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Aeluropus laevis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
